fields.narration: There was a liquidity gap and I ignored
Weak key level requires strong confirmation

fields.quote: Plan your trade and trade your plan.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The secret to trading success is emotional discipline.
fields.author: Victor Sperandeo

fields.quote: Fear and greed are the two strongest emotions in trading. Master them and you master the market.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The most important rule of trading is to play great defense, not great offense.
fields.author: Paul Tudor Jones

fields.quote: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The goal of a successful trader is to make the best trades. Money is secondary.
fields.author: Alexander Elder

fields.quote: Markets are constantly in a state of uncertainty and flux. Money is made by discounting the obvious and betting on the unexpected.
fields.author: George Soros

fields.quote: The elements of good trading are: (1) cutting losses, (2) cutting losses, and (3) cutting losses. If you can follow these three rules, you may have a chance.
fields.author: Ed Seykota

fields.quote: Successful trading is not about being right, it's about managing risk.
fields.author: Larry Hite

fields.quote: The difference between successful and unsuccessful traders is that successful traders have developed the ability to control their emotions.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the active to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: Patience is a key element of success. In trading, you have to wait for the right opportunity.
fields.author: Bill Lipschutz

fields.quote: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
fields.author: Jim Rohn

fields.quote: The market will test your discipline more than your intelligence.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Discipline is doing what you said you would do, even when you don't feel like it.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Without discipline, no trading system will work. With discipline, any trading system can work.
fields.author: Mark Douglas

fields.quote: The most important quality for a trader is discipline, not intelligence.
fields.author: Richard Dennis

fields.quote: Discipline means sticking to your rules even when you're losing.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trading is 20% strategy and 80% discipline.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your trading plan is your roadmap. Discipline is the vehicle that gets you there.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Discipline is choosing what you want most over what you want now.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The enemy of discipline is emotion. Master your emotions or they will master your account.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Discipline in trading is like brakes in a car. You need both to go fast safely.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Small losses with discipline are better than large losses with hope.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Discipline is the difference between a professional and an amateur.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trade your plan, don't plan your trade after you enter.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The secret to trading success is emotional discipline. If intelligence were the key, there would be a lot more people making money trading.
fields.author: Victor Sperandeo

fields.quote: Fear and greed are the two strongest emotions in trading. Master them and you master the market.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market is a psychological battlefield. The enemy is not other traders, it's yourself.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your mind is your most powerful trading tool. Keep it sharp, keep it calm, keep it focused.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Fear causes you to exit winners too early. Greed causes you to hold losers too long.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The greatest obstacle to trading success is not the market, but the trader's own psychology.
fields.author: Mark Douglas

fields.quote: Hope is the enemy of the losing trader. Hope keeps you in losing positions.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trading is 80% psychology and 20% mechanics.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market can remain irrational longer than you can remain solvent.
fields.author: John Maynard Keynes

fields.quote: Don't let a losing trade turn into a losing day. Don't let a losing day turn into a losing week. Don't let a losing week turn into a losing month.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The most difficult task in trading is not finding winning trades, but managing your emotions during losing streaks.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Ego is the enemy of good trading. Pride comes before a margin call.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: When you feel euphoric after a win, you're most vulnerable. When you feel devastated after a loss, you're most vulnerable.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trading is not about being right. It's about making money when you're right and losing as little as possible when you're wrong.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market has no emotions. Don't project yours onto it.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Revenge trading is the fastest way to blow up your account.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: When you feel the urge to overtrade, step away. The market will be there tomorrow.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your trading journal should record not just your trades, but your emotions during each trade.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The best trades feel uncomfortable because you're going against the crowd.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Confidence comes from preparation, not from winning streaks.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The most important rule of trading is to play great defense, not great offense.
fields.author: Paul Tudor Jones

fields.quote: Risk comes from not knowing what you're doing.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: Never risk more than 1-2% of your account on a single trade.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The first rule of trading is to survive. The second rule is to remember the first rule.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Cut your losses short and let your winners run.
fields.author: Ed Seykota

fields.quote: It's not about how much you make, it's about how much you don't lose.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Risk management is not about avoiding risk, but about managing it intelligently.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The goal is not to be right, but to make money when you're right and lose as little as possible when you're wrong.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your stop loss is your seatbelt. Don't drive without it.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Amateurs focus on how much they can make. Professionals focus on how much they can lose.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market is a giant transfer mechanism that takes money from the impatient and gives it to the patient. But it also takes money from those who don't manage risk and gives it to those who do.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Preservation of capital is more important than return on capital.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't risk what you need to make what you want.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The best risk management is not trading when the odds are against you.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your account size determines your risk per trade, not your confidence in the trade.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Losing trades are part of the game. The key is to keep losses small.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Risk management is knowing when to hold and when to fold.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The best traders are not the ones with the highest win rates, but the ones with the best risk management.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market is a device for transferring money from the impatient to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The goal of a successful trader is to make the best trades. Money is secondary.
fields.author: Alexander Elder

fields.quote: Success in trading is not about being a genius. It's about consistency, discipline, and patience.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Every master was once a beginner. Every expert was once a novice.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing.
fields.author: Philip Fisher

fields.quote: The four most dangerous words in investing are: "This time it's different."
fields.author: Sir John Templeton

fields.quote: In trading, you get what you deserve, not what you want.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market will humble you when you get too cocky and break you when you get too emotional.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trading is simple but not easy. Simple to understand, difficult to execute.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your next great trade could be just around the corner. Stay prepared, stay patient.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The difference between a successful trader and a failed trader is the ability to persist through losses.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Trading is a journey, not a destination. Enjoy the process, not just the profits.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Every loss is a lesson. Every lesson makes you better.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market rewards patience and punishes impulsiveness.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Successful traders are simply amateurs who never gave up.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Markets are constantly in a state of uncertainty and flux. Money is made by discounting the obvious and betting on the unexpected.
fields.author: George Soros

fields.quote: The elements of good trading are: (1) cutting losses, (2) cutting losses, and (3) cutting losses. If you can follow these three rules, you may have a chance.
fields.author: Ed Seykota

fields.quote: Trend is your friend until the end when it bends.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Buy on rumor, sell on news.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't catch a falling knife.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The trend is your friend except at the end where it bends.
fields.author: Ed Seykota

fields.quote: Markets can remain irrational longer than you can remain solvent.
fields.author: John Maynard Keynes

fields.quote: In trading, the first loss is the best loss.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market does not care about your opinion. It only cares about price.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't fight the tape.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The trend is your friend until it isn't.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the active to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: Be fearful when others are greedy, and greedy when others are fearful.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: It's not whether you're right or wrong that's important, but how much money you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.
fields.author: George Soros

fields.quote: The big money is not in the buying and selling, but in the waiting.
fields.author: Charlie Munger

fields.quote: Successful investing is about managing risk, not avoiding it.
fields.author: Benjamin Graham

fields.quote: The individual investor should act consistently as an investor and not as a speculator.
fields.author: Benjamin Graham

fields.quote: The function of economic forecasting is to make astrology look respectable.
fields.author: John Kenneth Galbraith

fields.quote: Wide diversification is only required when investors do not understand what they are doing.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The stock market is designed to transfer money from the active to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: The most important quality for an investor is temperament, not intellect.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: Successful trading is not about being right, it's about managing risk.
fields.author: Larry Hite

fields.quote: The difference between successful and unsuccessful traders is that successful traders have developed the ability to control their emotions.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your mindset determines your success more than your strategy.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Think like a survivor. Your goal is to stay in the game long enough to win.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market will test your patience, your discipline, and your resolve. Stay strong.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't let a winning trade make you overconfident or a losing trade make you doubtful.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The best traders approach the market with humility, not ego.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your trading mindset should be: "I will survive and I will thrive."
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Detach your self-worth from your trading results.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market owes you nothing. Approach each trade with zero expectations.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: A calm mind is a profitable mind.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't trade to make money. Trade to execute your strategy well. Money follows good execution.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market is neutral. It doesn't know you exist. Don't take losses personally.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Your mindset should be flexible like water, not rigid like ice.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Success in trading comes from having the right mindset, not from finding the perfect strategy.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The stock market is a device for transferring money from the active to the patient.
fields.author: Warren Buffett

fields.quote: Patience is a key element of success. In trading, you have to wait for the right opportunity.
fields.author: Bill Lipschutz

fields.quote: The stock market is filled with individuals who know the price of everything, but the value of nothing. Patience gives you value.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Great things never come from comfort zones. But they also never come from impatience.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The best trades are the ones you didn't take because you waited for the perfect setup.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Patience is not the ability to wait. It's the ability to keep a good attitude while waiting.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: In trading, patience is a competitive advantage.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The market will give you opportunities. Patience ensures you're ready when they come.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Don't force trades. Let the market come to you.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Patience in trading means waiting for the right pitch, not swinging at everything.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The money is made in the waiting, not in the trading.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: If you have patience, the market will eventually reward you. If you don't, it will eventually punish you.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: The difference between a successful trader and an unsuccessful one is often just a few days of patience.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: Patience is not passive waiting. It is active preparation for the right moment.
fields.author: Unknown

fields.quote: In a world of instant gratification, patience in trading is your superpower.
fields.author: Unknown
